rows.label: xs03040150_MSG0001
rows.name:
Lin, can you pinpoint Nelson
and the others' location?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs03040150_MSG0003
rows.name:
Looks like the IFF signal is being
transmitted from that building over there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs03040150_MSG0004
rows.name: We can't waste time. Let's go.[ST:wait ]
